name: NavigationBar
description: Top-bar family. `home` is the landing-screen bar (left-aligned title + trailing action icons); `page` is the drill-in bar (centred title + leading back / trailing action); `search` is the search-page bar (leading back + bare-text input filling the row + conditional clear). All three ride the same 56px min-height and 8/8 padding so they stay at one geometry across a navigation flow.
